channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Philippines farmers feeling the pinch of the war on Iran
item.description: Cabbage farmers in the Philippines are harvesting their crops at a loss as prices plunge and fuel costs soar.

item.title: Four killed in latest US attack on alleged drug-smuggling boat in Caribbean
item.description: The Trump administration has argued that the deadly strike targeted members of a 'designated terrorist organisation'.

item.title: Iran releases video claiming to show downing of US jet
item.description: Iran has released a video claiming to show the downing of a US F-18 fighter jet.

item.title: Explosions and smoke seen as Iranian missiles hit Israel
item.description: Explosions and smoke were seen in Israel after suspected Iranian strikes.

item.title: Trump to visit Xi Jinping in China on May 14 and 15 after Iran war delay
item.description: Press secretary Karoline Leavitt says Chinese President Xi Jinping will also visit US at a later date.

item.title: US tells Iran to accept defeat or Trump will ‘unleash hell’
item.description: The White House has warned Iran to accept what it called a military defeat, or the US will “hit harder” than before.

item.title: What’s Iran’s war strategy and what risks does it pose?
item.description: US-Israeli attacks have triggered global economic shocks.

item.title: UN chief says ‘high time’ to end ‘out of control’ war on Iran
item.description: UN Chief Antonio Guterres has said that the conflict in the Middle East is “out of control”.

item.title: Iran’s state TV outlines five conditions to end war
item.description: Iran’s state TV has set out a list of five demands it says must be met before the country will agree to end of the war.

item.title: Palestine Action hunger strikers to sue prisons over alleged mistreatment
item.description: Activists plan to take legal action against the UK prisons that allegedly mistreated them.
